purpose: Specifies the planning phase the master executes before any swarm runs: deep-thinking analysis, task decomposition, dependency graph construction, wave/chain layout choice, and writing the canonical plan.json before initialization.json. Includes guidance on right-sizing tasks (1-5 minute scope) and resolving shared-file conflicts via Pattern A/B/C.
gotchas: plan.json must exist before initialization.json -- it is the canonical planning artifact
Shared file ownership across tasks is the #1 cause of swarm bottlenecks; prefer Pattern C (separate files)
patterns: Waves for phase-grouping, chains for linear deps, hybrid for most real swarms
Pattern A/B/C decision tree for shared-file conflict resolution
conventions: Tasks described in 2-3 sentences max; longer descriptions indicate over-large tasks
